cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste, sir! Arnavaz Patel ji, this is Rohan from Bank of America. How are you today, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, I'm good. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, we've noticed some suspicious activity on your account. I need to inform you that your account has been locked for security reasons.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Locked? What kind of suspicious activity? Can you please explain, ji?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 21s: No policy violations detected yet. Conversation appears normal, continuing to monitor for suspicious activity.

scenario_info.description: Direct Phishing for Net Banking Password: Agent claims to be calling from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank and says the user's account is locked. They ask for username and password to "unlock it immediately."
